backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend with data types and CRUD operations for memories, quotes, fun facts, and messages, plus a passphrase check using the hardcoded code 'Nobita'.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (chat rename, intelligent bot responses, new mini-games) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, documenting component purposes and notable changes like import path corrections and removed footer text.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design token system (colors, borders, charts, sidebar).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Doraemon Secret World' that mounts the React app at the #root div via the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, enforces authentication guards, and wraps the app with StarBackground, FloatingMusicControl, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/FloatingMusicCon: Fixed bottom-right floating UI component providing play/pause and expandable volume slider controls, integrated with the useBGM hook.
frontend/src/components/GlassPanel.tsx: Reusable glassmorphism card component supporting configurable neon glow colors, optional float animation, hover lift effect, and a style prop.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation bar, and logout functionality, rendering child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Decorative fixed-position background component that renders 80 randomly positioned twinkling stars and 8 floating bubbles using CSS custom properties for animation timing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBGM.ts: Custom hook that manages background music playback using the HTML Audio API, exposing play/pause/toggle controls and volume state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including memories, quotes, fun facts, messages, and auth code verification.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the Doraemon-themed design system with custom CSS variables, glassmorphism utilities, neon glow effects, and Google Font imports via Tailwind layers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Chat page component that renders a conversation UI with Nobita, supporting message sending, bot auto-responses, typing indicators, and quick-reply shortcuts backed by backend message storage.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a hero section with Doraemon image and a grid of navigation portals (Memories, Friendship, Quotes, Games, Chat). Seeds initial data on first load using the actor hook.
frontend/src/pages/FriendshipPage.tsx: Page showcasing the Nobita and Doraemon friendship through a series of animated quote panels that slide in on scroll using IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/pages/games/ExamQuizPage.ts: A Doraemon trivia quiz game with 12 hardcoded questions, tracking score and showing explanations after each answer across idle/playing/over states.
frontend/src/pages/games/GadgetClickerPa: A 30-second click-as-fast-as-you-can game where emoji gadgets spawn and expire on screen, with combo multipliers, pop effects, and localStorage high score tracking.
frontend/src/pages/games/MazePage.tsx: A procedurally generated 15x11 maze game using recursive backtracking, supporting keyboard (WASD/arrow) and touch controls, tracking moves and elapsed time until the player reaches the goal.
frontend/src/pages/games/MemoryMatchPage: A memory card matching game with 12 emoji pairs, tracking moves, matches, and elapsed time, with flip/match animations and a reset option.
frontend/src/pages/games/SlidingPuzzlePa: A 3x3 sliding puzzle game page where players rearrange emoji tiles into order, tracking moves and elapsed time with a reset option and win detection.
frontend/src/pages/games/WhackADoraemonP: A whack-a-mole style game featuring Doraemon characters that pop up in a 3x3 grid; players score points by clicking characters while avoiding bombs, with a 45-second timer, lives, combos, and high score persistence.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Games hub page listing six Doraemon-themed mini-games (Sliding Puzzle, Maze, Memory Match, Gadget Clicker, Exam Quiz, Whack-a-Doraemon) as clickable cards that navigate to individual game routes.
frontend/src/pages/LockScreen.tsx: Authentication gate page that prompts the user for a secret code, verifies it via a mutation hook, and redirects to the dashboard on success while storing auth state in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/pages/MemoriesPage.tsx: Page for viewing and adding personal memories, fetching existing entries from the backend and allowing the user to submit new ones via an inline form.
frontend/src/pages/QuotesPage.tsx: Displays a page with random Doraemon quotes and fun facts, each refreshable via React Query invalidation with fade/scale transition animations.
frontend/src/utils/botResponses.ts: A rule-based NLP chatbot engine that provides in-character responses as Nobita from Doraemon, with categorized response pools for topics like greetings, love, friendship, and memories.
frontend/src/utils/seedData.ts: Provides static sample data arrays for memories, quotes, and fun facts all themed around Doraemon, used to seed the application's initial content.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a Doraemon-themed design system with custom colors (dora palette), fonts (Orbitron, Space Grotesk, Nunito), glow box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a Doraemon-themed web app including existing features (chat rename, AI chatbot, mini-games), architectural notes, image requirements, and new feature requests.
